figures.caption: Table 2: Graph datasets & their power-law scaling parameter 𝛼 .
Table 7: Mean 𝑙1 (%) in local model, averaged over 20 runs. Bold marks the lowest mean within each dataset and 𝑑min block.

Table 8: Mean 𝑙1 error for 𝜀 with 𝑑min = 1 for Syn-power-1, Brightkite, and Ego-twitter. Bold marks the best method within the Central and Local blocks for each 𝜀 within each dataset. The Ego-twitter NO/LR entry at 𝜀 = 0.1 is marked – because all runs optimized to 𝛼 < 0; with the minimum 𝛼 clamped to 0, no valid estimates remained.
